problems_encountered.description: Tool requires 'app' parameter but unclear what format/value is expected. Tried 'PHP' (app name) which resulted in 400 error from API endpoint v2/apps/PHP/versions.
API returned 400 status when called with app='PHP'. Error suggests the parameter format is incorrect or the app identifier should be different (possibly app ID instead of name).

tool_response_summary: Tool execution failed with validation/API error. Unable to determine correct app parameter format.
execution_notes: Tool schema indicates 'app' parameter is required but documentation doesn't specify expected format. Attempted with app name 'PHP' resulted in 400 Bad Request from /v2/apps/PHP/versions endpoint. May need app UUID instead of name, or different identifier format.
